# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind launches AI-assisted problem solving with updated Code Breach tower defense visuals
- Summary: Showcase the refreshed Code Breach cyberpunk UI and AI assistant capabilities guiding users through practice problems with live code execution and model-assisted help.
- Slug: codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-updates
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-updates
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-03-codegrind-ai-assistant-and-tower-defense-updates.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind blends LeetCode-style challenges with an Azure OpenAI-powered assistant and an updated Code Breach cyberpunk tower-defense aesthetic. Real-time code execution, problem-solving guidance, and enhanced visuals help users learn by doing, iterating, and visualizing programming concepts as defensive towers.
- CTA: Try a practice problem now and ask the AI assistant for hints or explanations as you code.
- Visual brief: A short 15-20 second demo video showing the CodeGrind editor with a live problem, the AI assistant panel giving tips, and a quick view of the cyberpunk Code Breach towers transforming as code is written. End with a clean logo and a call-to-action to start solving.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
